response.step_by_step_log:
Analyzed the video to identify three distinct segments. 
Segment 1: Identified "七英雄バトル" (Romancing SaGa 2) through on-screen text. Performer is Patra Suou. Search for official lyrics confirmed it is primarily an instrumental track, no official lyrics.
Segment 2: Identified "Panther" (Armored Core 4) through on-screen text. Performer is Patra Suou. Search for official lyrics confirmed it is an instrumental track from the game soundtrack.
Segment 3: Identified "Break The World" (Kamen Rider: SummonRide!) through on-screen text. Performer is Patra Suou. Search confirmed it is an official theme song, but official lyrics are not readily available in public bilingual databases. 
Set lyrics to null where not found.
response.global_summary: A 3-song musical performance medley by the virtual character Patra Suou, consisting of "七英雄バトル" from Romancing SaGa 2, "Panther" from Armored Core 4, and "Break The World" from Kamen Rider: SummonRide!. The artist performed vocal covers of these primarily instrumental tracks (with the exception of the original theme song in the final track).

scenes.description: Patra Suou performs a vocal cover of "七英雄バトル" from Romancing SaGa 2, with the song title and source appearing in the top-left corner.
Patra Suou performs a vocal cover of "Panther" from Armored Core 4.
Patra Suou performs a cover of "Break The World" from Kamen Rider: SummonRide!.
